agent_output.markdown:
# CYDELPHI | Meeting Brief
*2026-03-03*

## TL;DR
CYDELPHI is a B2B cybersecurity company offering an AI-driven automated incident response platform that manages the full lifecycle of security incidents via playbooks, runbooks, and a multi-tenant command center. The company closed a $3M seed round in February 2026, backed by Glasswing Ventures and Blu Ventures [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452). Despite the recent funding, a notable headcount contraction warrants scrutiny heading into this meeting [[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452).

---

## Why This Meeting Matters
• **Recent seed funding signals early institutional validation:** CYDELPHI raised $3M as recently as February 2026, with participation from Glasswing Ventures and Blu Ventures — both active in the cybersecurity space — indicating the thesis has cleared at least one institutional bar [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• **Headcount contraction is a red flag at this stage:** A -16.7% headcount decline over 90 days at a 5-person company means at least one departure from a very small team, which is a material signal worth probing at the seed stage [[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• **Nascent web traction:** Web traffic stands at just 430, with no measurable growth trend available, suggesting the company is pre-traction and likely pre-revenue or very early in go-to-market [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)[[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)

---

## Company Snapshot

|---|---|
| Founded | 2024 |

| Employees | 5 (-16.7% over 90 days) |
| Products | Automated incident response platform with AI-driven workflows, playbooks/runbooks, multi-tenant command center, and data lake integration |
| Customers | B2B (specific customers not found in table) |

| Last Round | $3,000,000 — February 12, 2026 |

---

## Founders
**Doron Kolton** — VP Engineering | N/A
Background not yet available. Kolton is the only leadership figure identified in the company profile. No additional biographical detail is provided in the available data. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)

---

## Key Signals
• [**Team Contraction**] Headcount declined 16.7% over the past 90 days, dropping to 5 employees — a significant proportional loss for a seed-stage team — Source: CYDELPHI Key Signals [[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• [**Funding**] Seed round of $3M closed February 12, 2026, with Glasswing Ventures and Blu Ventures as investors — Source: CYDELPHI Company Profile [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)

---

## In the News
No recent news available.

---

## Meeting Prep
**Key questions to ask:**
• The team has shrunk by ~16.7% in 90 days despite closing a $3M seed round just recently — who departed, why, and how does leadership plan to rebuild or right-size the team? [[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• With only one named leader (VP Engineering) and no CEO or GTM leadership identified in the profile, who is driving commercial strategy and customer acquisition? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)
• Web traffic sits at just 430 with no growth trend — do you have any paying customers or signed pilots, and what does the go-to-market motion look like post-funding? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)[[3]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/62587452)

**Recommended next step:** Request a full cap table, org chart, and any customer/pipeline data before advancing — the headcount contraction and leadership gaps need to be explained before further diligence is warranted.
